---
name: Bug report
about: Something behaves incorrectly
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## What you expected

What you expected to happen instead.

## To reproduce

Steps, ideally the exact command. Remember that a real profile is private: share a minimal,
fictional profile that reproduces the issue, not your own.

```bash
job-seeker find --profile ./example.md --terms "..." --format json
```

## Which part

- [ ] A source adapter (which board?)
- [ ] Scoring or eligibility (a wrong verdict on a specific posting)
- [ ] Relevance / dedup / ranking
- [ ] CLI or MCP server
- [ ] Reporting (JSON / CSV / HTML)

## Environment

- job-seeker version or commit:
- Python version:
- OS:
